name: Senator Tommy Tuberville
tweet: I look forward to working with my colleagues on legislation to create an election commission that could lead to important reforms. Moving forward, I will continue to be a voice for the people of Alabama regarding the security of our elections.

name: Senator Tommy Tuberville
tweet: Although the election results were not what many Alabamians - including myself - would like, the process of certifying the election results needs to be completed.

name: Senator Tommy Tuberville
tweet: Because I promised to raise these concerns on behalf of my constituents, I voted against seating the electors from Arizona and Pennsylvania.

name: Senator Tommy Tuberville
tweet: The integrity of our elections is vital to our country. I have serious concerns that the states of Arizona and Pennsylvania did not act in accordance with their own duly enacted laws when conducting this election.

name: Senator Tommy Tuberville
tweet: Yesterday was a sad day for our great country. I strongly condemn the violence and actions we saw from those who stormed the Capitol. It undermines the freedoms we enjoy as Americans, and it has no place in our democracy.

name: Senator Tommy Tuberville
tweet: It is critical to ensure the voices of the millions of Americans who voted for President Trump are heard and not diminished by voter fraud or election irregularities.

name: Senator Tommy Tuberville
tweet: Under President Trump’s Leadership, we’ve seen unprecedented efforts to protect our southern border, cut taxes for Americans, and confirm a record number of conservative judges to the Federal bench.

name: Senator Tommy Tuberville
tweet: I believe the appointment of a commission to study this issue and propose reforms, either at the state or federal level, would be a positive step toward ensuring the integrity of future elections.

name: Senator Tommy Tuberville
tweet: Elections are too important to allow significant deviations from state law, and I am hopeful that the process tomorrow will at least shine a bright light on the need to investigate potential wrongdoing and to propose reforms.

name: Senator Tommy Tuberville
tweet: In our country, elections are generally governed by the individual states, but there are serious questions about whether, for example, Arizona’s electors were selected in accordance with the duly enacted laws of the State of Arizona, which is a requirement of the Constitution.

name: Senator Tommy Tuberville
tweet: Tomorrow afternoon I will join Senator Ted Cruz in objecting to Electoral College results from Arizona, and I am carefully considering additional states that may require my objection.
